content.en:
A half-step Eternal Realm arrives here and discovers the changes in the Sea of Silence.

"It's ......"

The half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse, Thousand Feather Origin Ancestor, looked at that golden tree in shock, and immediately felt that this must be a shocking opportunity, and it may even be a chance that was only born once in 100,000 eternal years that was recently reported.

"There's a good chance I'll be number one!"

The Thousand Feather Origin Ancestor was extremely excited, and immediately flew towards the depths of the void where the golden tree was located.

However, a strange force struck.

"Not good!"

Only then did he remember the horror of the Sea of Silence, and the place where the golden tree was located was not the Sea of Silence, but it was most likely the true source of the Sea of Silence.

He was blinded by chance, and this did not think of this problem.

Rumble!!!!

Under the impact of the strange power, the will of the Thousand Feather Origin Ancestor was destroyed, and his consciousness gradually lost, and his body turned into a corpse floating on the golden avenue.

Soon after, the vision here was completely discovered and spread throughout the source sea.

Extreme realm powerhouses such as the Qing Ying Saint Ancestor of the True Extreme Palace and the Qiyuan Source Ancestor from the space-time territory also came here.

At the same time, a large number of extreme realms have descended here.

Of course, most of the polar realms here come from space-time territories, but there are relatively few extreme realms that belong to the source sea.

"Found it, this is the real chance that will only be born once in 100,000 eternal years!"

The Extreme Realm was incredibly sure.

Immediately, they informed the lords of the space-time territory.

Whoa!!

A Celestial Realm wants to rush in, otherwise when the Eternal Realm Lord descends, where will it be their turn!

When a Famous Extreme Realm rushed into the Golden Dao, he quickly turned into a corpse, and only one of the Five Extreme Realm powerhouses did not fall.

However, under the impact of this strange power, he trembled all over, and obviously suffered severe pain.

Seeing this scene, those weak extreme realms did not dare to enter.

With so many extreme realms falling all at once, how long has it been since Yuanhai happened?

"Get down, you won't be allowed to go in until our Xuanyu Lord arrives!"

A seven-pole realm half-step Eternal Realm made a move, and with one hand penetrated deep into the Golden Dao, he directly grabbed the five-pole realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse and threw it directly to a distant place.

Bang!!!!!

A venerable sixth-seventh-realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse stopped here, and no powerhouse was allowed to enter.

Soon, the Lords of the Eternal Realm descended.

Lord of the North Sea, Lord of Jade, Lord of Clothes, Lord of the Crane......

One lord after another descended, and the aura of each lord made those half-step eternal realms tremble, and they didn't dare to look at them at all.

When the lord of the dress saw the golden tree, his eyes lit up.

"If the skill master didn't guess wrong, this should be the golden sea tree forever, the chance of being born this time turned out to be it!"

"Hahaha, it is indeed the Eternal Knowledge Golden Sea Tree, the Eternal Knowledge Golden Sea Tree can give birth to the Eternal Knowledge Golden Fruit, it can enhance our will, and even help break the bottleneck shackles. The Eternal Awareness Golden Sea Tree also has a huge effect, that is, it can upgrade the space-time lord and upgrade the ordinary space-time lord to the eternal space-time territory. An eternal space-time lord with unimaginable resources. If I snatch the Eternal Knowing Golden Sea Tree, I will definitely be able to become the top existence in the Eternal Realm!"

"Joke, you can also snatch the Eternal Knowing Golden Sea Tree, it must belong to me!"

"Forever know that the Golden Sea Tree belongs to me!"

A lord quarreled.

They didn't waste time arguing, and immediately rushed into the Golden Dao, entered the depths of the unknown void, and went to the place where the Eternal Golden Sea Tree was.

Abrupt.

Voices came in.

"Come in later, there's some good stuff here, and it's useful to you!"

The lords reminded their minions, and messaged.

"Anything else?"

These Polar Realms were excited and rushed in one by one.

As far as they knew, the chance that was born 100,000 years ago was just a treasure, and there were no other treasures, so it only caused the Eternal Realm to fight, but the half-step Eternal Realm did not gain any benefits, but was affected, and the battle was heavy.

"It's the right time this time, hurry inside!"

A six-pole realm half-step eternal realm said excitedly.

In the space-time territory, many seven-pole realm or even eight-pole realm half-step eternal realm powerhouses were unwilling to follow the orders of the eternal realm to come here to find the opportunity of once in a hundred thousand eternal years, so there was no way to descend on the source sea.

Therefore, those strong people have lost this opportunity this time.

Basically, the half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses above the Four Extremes Realm have all passed through the Golden Dao, but even if the half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses of the Four Extremes Realm have passed through the Golden Avenue at the price, they can only barely walk into the land where the deep void is located, and they can't go deep at all.

As for the half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse of the Three Extremes Realm, they didn't dare to enter it at all, once they stepped into the Golden Dao, they would not be able to go far at all, and they would be bombarded by strange forces.

Outside the Golden Mile.

The True River Sword Ancestors of the Source God Temple stood here, sighing one by one, and they didn't dare to enter at all.

"Forget it, this opportunity has nothing to do with us, it's better to sign up, let's go!"

"Well, let's go, I wonder if the Endless Ancestor has entered?"

"The Endless Ancestor hasn't appeared, and he probably hasn't entered it, right?"

Either way, though, this chance has nothing to do with them.

--------------------

"The Immortal Golden Sunflower is another treasure that makes the Extreme Realm crazy!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

In such a short period of time, he had found dozens of treasures, most of which were treasures he didn't recognize.

Thundered!!!!

The breath of an eternal realm came from a distance, and it was not concealed in the slightest.

"The Eternal Lord is here!"

Ye Tian immediately concealed his aura, and even hid himself with the will that had reached the second order.

As long as the Eternal Realm Lord didn't investigate carefully, he would still be able to hide himself.

The real target of those Eternal Realm Lords was only that Eternal Knowledge Golden Sea Tree, so they didn't explore other places.

They also didn't want to waste time and cause the Eternal Golden Sea Tree to be taken away.

Therefore, they found no trace of Ye Tian.

However, when these Eternal Realms approached the Eternal Consciousness Golden Sea Tree, they were much slower one by one, and the strange power also affected them.

Although Ye Tian was interested in the Eternal Knowledge Golden Sea Tree, he knew that he could not compete with the Eternal Realm, so his goal was only other resources.

Compared to other extreme realms, his will is comparable to that of the Eternal Realm, so he can go to more places.

So, he was able to get more resources.

"Almost, it's time for the clone to go back with these resources!"

Ye Tian muttered.
